allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Recurse '\\''C:\\Users\\Rudransh Singh\\Downloads\\CR'\\'' -Exclude node_modules,dist,.git,.claude | Where-Object {!$_.PSIsContainer} | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 FullName,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Recurse '\\''C:\\Users\\Rudransh Singh\\Downloads\\CR'\\'' -Exclude node_modules,dist,.git | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer -and $_.FullName -notmatch '\\''node_modules|dist|\\.git|\\.claude'\\'' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 | ForEach-Object { $_.LastWriteTime.ToString\('\\''HH:mm:ss'\\''\) + '\\''  '\\'' + $_.FullName }')
